name: architecture_hosts_alt
description: Alternate architecture revision modeled on USD00050014_Rev_C Cybersecurity Architecture.docx — overlapping but not identical vocabulary to the Rev_B case. Pins that two adjacent doc revisions independently produce coherent token sets and the kernel is satisfied by both (catches the assessor over-fitting the prompt to one specific revision's prose).

fixture_docs.title: Cybersecurity Architecture Rev C
fixture_docs.text:
## 2.0 System overview

The accreditation boundary covers the operations enclave deployed on Example-managed VMware ESXi hosts (esx-a1.example.local through esx-a8.example.local). Guest VMs are orchestrated by vCenter (vcenter.example.local) and protected by Example-Backup (Veeam B&R 12).

Identity federation is provided via Azure AD as the upstream IdP, federated to the on-prem Okta tenant for application-tier SSO. Privileged access is brokered through CyberArk PAM with session recording.

## 5.0 Telemetry stack

Forward-only telemetry from agents:

  * Splunk Universal Forwarder -> siem.example.local:9997
  * CrowdStrike Falcon sensor -> falcon.crowdstrike.com (egress allow-listed)
  * Tenable Nessus Agent -> tenable.example.local:8834

## 6.0 Network zones

Production (prod), pre-production (preprod), and disaster-recovery (dr-site) zones. Inter-zone traffic enforced by Fortinet FortiGate 600F pairs.
